conversation_summary.domain: Laboratory + Geotechnical + Project Management software (NGE context)

key_concepts.affaire_rst: Internal operational project entity used in RaLab, central pivot
key_concepts.demande: Request/task linked to an affaire RST, always created from a source
key_concepts.rule_core: A demande is always created first, then linked to an affaire RST (existing or newly created)

affaire_creation_logic.if_affaire_exists: Create only demande and attach to existing affaire RST
affaire_creation_logic.if_affaire_not_exists: Create affaire RST then create demande and link it

affaire_code_logic.true_affaire_format: RA + letter(year) + number(01-99) + optional suffix letter + agency letter

data_structure.final_codes: Already constructed in enterprise columns (gsa, ehtp, etc.)
data_structure.rule: Use final codes, do not reconstruct artificially

remaining_constraints: Some codes appear only in titles
Excel sheets can be multiple and inconsistent
Certain codes like MVA/DE required parsing improvements

ralab3.db.writes: Committed on backend shutdown (SQLite WAL flush behavior)

affaires.db.fix: Ignore id from Excel, use business keys, perform upsert

reference_update_system.design_principle: Detect automatically, notify user, never update automatically
flow: Display status (à jour / mise à jour disponible)

current_state.issue: These pages are maintenance-oriented, not operational

general_flow: User interacts with source (DST / Affaires NGE / Études)
System checks if affaire RST exists
If no → create affaire RST + demande
workflow_model.important_principle: Affaire is never created alone; always through demande context

resolved_issues: Manual correction tool created for affaires
current_problems: Operational pages (Affaires NGE / Études) not yet built
Creation workflow not yet integrated into those pages
Global regularisation UI abandoned due to instability
next_steps: Ensure consistent linking logic across all sources
Eventually unify UI patterns across modules

user_preference: Prefers working solutions over theoretical perfection
Strong sensitivity to real-world métier logic
assistant_adjustment: Moved from abstract design to concrete tools
Reduced complexity after failed global UI
Aligned with user's operational workflow mindset

implicit_understandings: RaLab is evolving from tool to full operational system
Data integrity is more important than automation
UI must follow real workflows, not abstract structures
Affaire ↔ Demande linkage is the backbone of the system

conversation_state.phase: Transition from data import to operational UI design
conversation_state.confidence_level: High alignment between user and assistant
conversation_state.ready_for: Implementation of DST-like pages for Affaires NGE and Études
